items.title: Clear Secure (YOU) Jumps 22.6% After JPMorgan Turns Bullish
items.description: We recently published 10 Stocks Delivering Explosive 18-190% Gains. Clear Secure, Inc. (NYSE:YOU) is one of the last week’s heavy gainers. Clear Secure surged by 22.6 percent week-on-week to hit a new four-year high, as investors took heart from JPMorgan turning bullish on its stock, having raised its rating and price target by 20 percent. […]
